name: Bill Elliott
description: American pianist, bandleader, Hollywood composer and Broadway orchestrator
abstract: Bill Elliott (born William F. Elliott; October 2, 1951) is an American pianist, bandleader, Hollywood composer and Broadway orchestrator.

works_created.t: How Do You Do A Number?

about_quotes.speaker: Lorraine Feather
about_quotes.evidence: Bill Elliot, who used to have a big band when I was in L.A. and has written a couple of songs with me... So we wrote a 15-minute piece... we're working on something else, Bill and I.
about_quotes.doc_title: Lorraine Feather interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, March 22, 2023
